dissent_flag.dissent_reason: Split core vote: technical bullish with CLEAN_BULL ribbon (129c spread, 3 green bars) vs level_thesis/internals bearish citing tech weakness and PMH resistance at 732.62. Macro neutral due to conflicting VIX falling vs overnight gap-down.

validator_assessment.weakest_link: The bearish consensus relies heavily on overnight gap-down and XLK weakness, but the technical ribbon shows strong bullish structure (CLEAN_BULL, 129c spread, 3 consecutive green bars) that bearish agents did not adequately address. The close-ceiling pattern is only 5 bars old and could break on any momentum shift.
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: SPY breaks above 732.62 PMH and closes above it with volume expansion (>50k shares) — invalidates the close-ceiling distribution pattern

risk_assessment.top_risk: Monthly options expiry creates elevated pin risk to 732.62 and 734.97 levels regardless of directional conviction

secondary.condition: if SPY breaks above 732.62 and reclaims 734.97

invalidation.condition: SPY breaks above 732.62 PMH and closes above it with volume expansion (>50k shares)
invalidation.effect: Invalidates the close-ceiling distribution pattern; pattern_scout's bearish thesis collapses if price closes above 732.62 with conviction

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY tests 732.62 PMH resistance within first 90 minutes of RTH
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY does not touch 732.62 before 11:00 ET

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX remains in MID regime (17-22) and does not spike above 25
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX closes above 25 or drops below 15

swarm_predictions.claim: Ribbon maintains BULL stack (fast > slow) through first hour of RTH
swarm_predictions.invalidation: Ribbon flips to BEAR stack (slow > fast) before 11:30 ET

synthesis_narrative: CORE 4 SPECIALIST VOTE SPLIT (0.35 bullish vs 0.35 bearish) — technical's CLEAN_BULL ribbon (129c spread, 3 consecutive green bars, price 310c above pivot) is offset by level_thesis/internals bearish on overnight gap-down and XLK-led weakness. Supplemental panel tilts bearish (4 bearish vs 1 bullish vs 4 no_trade) but weak participation (0.27x volume) undermines conviction. Validator flags structural flaw: bullish ribbon ignored by bearish consensus. Risk assessor recommends SKIP due to monthly expiry pin risk. NO_TRADE: insufficient directional conviction with split core vote.

technical.one_line: CLEAN_BULL ribbon with 129c spread (fast 731.2 > slow 729.91), last 3 bars green with full bodies, price 310c above pivot 730.11 — strong bullish structure

macro.one_line: VIX 19.17 MID regime falling suggests fear receding, but overnight gap-down $1.09 and stale calendar create mixed signals

level_thesis.one_line: Battle at 732.62 PMH resistance; price below prior close 734.30; bearish if holds, bullish if breaks and reclaims 734.97

internals.one_line: XLK down -1.0% leading SPY lower, tech weakness dragging index despite flat XLF/XLE — narrow breadth selloff

validator.top_invalidation: SPY breaks above 732.62 PMH with volume expansion invalidates bearish close-ceiling thesis
